mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_idx AS replyIdx, r.board_idx AS boardIdx, r.parent_reply_idx AS parentReplyIdx, r.user_id AS userId, m.user_name AS userName, r.content AS content, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tb_board_reply r INNER JOIN members m ON r.user_id = m.user_id WHERE r.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND r.parent_reply_idx IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.reply_idx DESC

SELECT reply_idx AS replyIdx, board_idx AS boardIdx, parent_reply_idx AS parentReplyIdx, user_id AS userId, content AS content, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tb_board_reply WHERE reply_idx=#{replyIdx}
